member.name: M:GTA.World.CreateParticleEffectNonLooped(GTA.ParticleEffectAsset,System.String,GTA.EntityBone,GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.Math.Vector3,System.Single,GTA.InvertAxisFlags)
member.summary:
Starts a Particle Effect on an
that runs once then is destroyed.
member.param:
The
the effect is attached to.

The offset from the
to attach the effect.

The rotation, relative to the
, the effect has.
How much to scale the size of the effect by.
Which axis to flip the effect in. For a car side exahust you may need to flip in the Y Axis
member.returns:
If the effect was able to start; otherwise,
.
